name: milvus-rag
description: General-purpose agentic RAG plugin for OpenAI Codex. Attach any Milvus collection as a live document corpus.

interface.shortDescription: Turn any Milvus collection into a Codex research tool
interface.longDescription: Attach a running Milvus collection to Codex as a live document corpus. The plugin exposes retrieval tools for semantic search, regex matching, exact row fetching, corpus browsing, and coverage checks. It works with any Milvus schema that carries a text field, and semantic search can be enabled by adding vector and embedding endpoint settings.
